name: Morphling
description: You only miss the water when the well runs dry.

abilities.name: Waveform
abilities.description: Spell / Magical / Attack Damage / Physical. Cast Range: 700/775/850/925 (950/1025/1100/1175). Max Travel Distance: 700/775/850/925 (950/1025/1100/1175). Effect Radius: 200. Damage: 75/150/225/300. Cooldown: 21/18/15/12. Mana Cost: 115.

abilities.name: Adaptive Strike
abilities.description: The damage component is based on Morphling's agility. If Morphling's agility is much higher than strength, the max agility damage factor is used. The knockback and stun component is based on Morphling's strength. If Morphling's strength is much higher than agility, the max knockback distance is used. Cast Range: 600/675/750/825. Base Damage: 50/70/90/110. Min Damage Factor: 0.5. Max Damage Factor: 1/1.5/2/2.5. Min Knock Distance: 50. Max Knock Distance: 350. Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 40/50/60/70.

abilities.name: Attribute Shift
abilities.description: Enables Attribute Shift casting while being affected by most disable sources. Reduces mana cost. Shift Interval: 0.25/0.12/0.08/0.06. Cooldown: 4/8/13/17.

abilities.name: Morph
abilities.description: Creates a strong illusion of the targeted enemy hero that can cast all of the affected enemy's basic abilities with Alt-Cast toggled on. The morphed illusion is a strong illusion that deals as much damage as Morphling and receives additional incoming damage. Cast Range: 700/850/1000. Base Attributes Conversion Factor: 1. Duration: 24 (36). Number of Illusions: 1. Damage Dealt: 100%. Damage Taken: 300%. Cooldown: 140/100/60. Mana Cost: 50.
